text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That was a great training session! I'm
starving!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, once again you shine brilliantly in the night
sky!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? I know that voice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I knew it was you, Ope! Are you leaving to get
dinner?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was just about to go for a run, together with the
evening star up yonder!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You run with the stars?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I always train my body under the glimmer
of the stars!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I wanna try that! That sounds like an
amazing way to get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm gonna do it! Star training will no
doubt make me the strongest Umamusume ever!
First place is as good as mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Splendid, my dear! But I shall not relinquish the
starlight of first place so easily!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! I was gonna say the same thing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha ha! What an amusing run this will be!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Wait... for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara puts her whole being into this extra
training!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Is that right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho... It is indeed so, lest a shadow gathers
beneath the light!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In fact only yesterday, I immersed myself in a rose
bath!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I get it now! Then I'm gonna rest too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: In a rose bath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After asking to borrow some rose petals, Haru
Urara returns to her room in a great mood.
